channel.title: My DSA Journey — Weekly Digest
channel.description: Weekly rotation of one real-world case study, one pattern drill, and one hard-mode challenge from the 30-week DSA Journey.

item.title: Weekly Digest 2026-W21
item.description: Case study: How "Discover Weekly" is a Graph + Matrix Factorization Problem Pattern drill (Week 2, #2): Read an integer score 0–100 and print the letter grade: A (>=90), B (>=80), C (>=70), D (>=60), F otherwise. Challenge 2 (Week 2): Tax Bracket Salary Computer
